eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Ashtabula; Cuyahoga; Erie; Geauga; Lake; Huron; Medina; Lorain, OH; at 09:27 PM ON FEB 9, 2026 Effective until 10:27 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: We interrupt this program to activate the Emergency Alert System for an AMBER Alert.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 Be on the lookout for an abducted child from Cuyahoga County, Ohio.                                                                                                                                                                                                       The child was last seen at 4389 Northfield Road Warrensville Heights, Ohio.                                                                                                                                                                                                           The suspect is believed to be driving a silver SUV.                                                                                The suspect has been identified as Jamerica Laquise Mitchell, a 35 year old Black female 5 feet 2 inches tall, 125 pounds with black hair, and pierced cheeks.  The abducted child is Maliha Neveah Merriweather a one month old Black female with black hair, last seen wearing a white jump suit.                                                                                                    Please call 1 8 7 7 A M B E R O H or dial 911 immediately if you see the child, the suspect or the suspect vehicle.  This concludes the Emergency Alert System message. Stay tuned for further instructions.
